{"problem_standardized_math":"Show that the symmetric rank-one (SR1) update\n\\[\nB_{k+1}=B_k+\\frac{(y_k-B_ks_k)(y_k-B_ks_k)^T}{(y_k-B_ks_k)^Ts_k}\n\\]\nand the BFGS update\n\\[\nB_{k+1}=B_k-\\frac{B_ks_ks_k^TB_k}{s_k^TB_ks_k}+\\frac{y_ky_k^T}{y_k^Ts_k}\n\\]\nare scale-invariant when the initial Hessian approximations are chosen appropriately. Using the notation of the previous exercise, show that if these methods are applied to $f(x)$ starting from $x_0=Sz_0+s$ with initial Hessian approximation $B_0$, and to $\\tilde f(z)$ starting from $z_0$ with initial Hessian approximation $S^TB_0S$, then the iterates satisfy\n\\[\nx_k=Sz_k+s\n\\]\nfor all $k$. Assume, for simplicity, that unit step lengths are used."}
